_comment: To regenerate: python baseline_builder.py   OR   make baseline

gpt-5._note: Benchmark numbers estimated from published relative-performance claims vs GPT-4o and o1. No full public eval table published.

gpt-5-mini._note: Estimated as efficient variant of gpt-5; relative to gpt-4.1-mini precedent.

claude-opus-4-6._note: Estimated from Anthropic published claims and relative-to-claude-3.5-sonnet positioning.

anthropic/claude-opus-4-6._note: Estimated from Anthropic published claims and relative-to-claude-3.5-sonnet positioning.

claude-sonnet-4-6._note: Estimated from Anthropic's positioning relative to claude-3.5-sonnet.

anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6._note: Estimated from Anthropic's positioning relative to claude-3.5-sonnet.

claude-haiku-4-5._note: Estimated fast/efficient variant of claude-4 family.

anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5._note: Estimated fast/efficient variant of claude-4 family.

claude-haiku-4-5-20251001._note: Estimated fast/efficient variant of claude-4 family.

deepseek/deepseek-r1:free._note: Same weights as deepseek-r1, served free on OpenRouter with rate limits.

qwen/qwen3-8b._note: Estimated from Qwen3 blog relative performance claims vs Qwen2.5-7B.

qwen/qwen3-8b:free._note: Estimated from Qwen3 blog relative performance claims vs Qwen2.5-7B.

microsoft/phi-4-mini._note: Estimated from published relative claims vs phi-4 and SLM benchmark comparisons.

phi4-mini._note: Estimated from published relative claims vs phi-4 and SLM benchmark comparisons.
